manure.title: Manure data
manure.description: You thought it's a waste, but those crops need to eat as well

soil_2.title: Second soil data
soil_2.description: Soil is still being treated like dirt.

fertilizer_schedule.title: Fertilizer schedule.
fertilizer_schedule.description: Fertilizer is like butter, you can never have too much.

manure_schedule.title: Manure schedule.
manure_schedule.description: Crappier than having 7:45 am classes Monday - Friday.

field.title: Field specification
field.description: Contains overall field properties and references to specification files.

start_date.description: The year and Julian day on which the simulation will start.

end_date.description: The year and Julian day on which the simulation will end.

graphic_dir.description: The location of the output graphics directory

output_dir.description: The location of the output directory

simulate_animals.description: Whether or not to simulate animals during the simulation

calf_num.description: The average number of pre-weaned calves (head)

cow_num.description: The number of dry and lactating cows (head)

heiferI_num.description: HeiferI is the number of youngstock post-weaning and before breeding (head)

heiferII_num.description: HeiferII is the number of heifers eligible for breeding and in early pregnancy (head)

heiferIII_num_springers.description: HeiferIII is the number of close-up heifers (head)

herd_init.description: Whether or not to initialize a herd if the milk prod and body weight numbers are exceedingly abnormal

herd_num.description: The number of lactating and milking cows on farm (head)

breed.description: The predominant breed of the herd (Holstein - HO or Jersey - JE)

crop_species.description: Name of the crop being grown.

harvest_days.description: Julian day(s) of year to harvest

harvest_years.description: Calendar years in which the harvesting occurs

harvest_operations.description: Operation(s) with which this crop will be harvested.

harvest_type.description: Whether the crop uses scheduled harvests or optimal harvests

planting_days.description: Julian day(s) of year to plant

planting_years.description: Calendar years in which the planting occurs

pattern_repeat.description: Number of times that this crop schedule should be repeated.

pattern_skip.description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

available_fertilizer_mixes.description: All the available fertilizer mixes that are available besides the default ones.

mix_names.description: List of the mix names that will be used for the corresponding fertilizer application.

years.description: List of years in which fertilizer will be applied.

days.description: List of days on which fertilizer will be applied.

nitrogen_masses.description:
List of minimum nitrogen masses that the corresponding fertilizer applications should contain.
Units: kg.

phosphorus_masses.description:
List of minimum phosphorus masses that the corresponding fertilizer applications should contain.
Units: kg.

potassium_masses.description:
List of minimum potassium masses that the corresponding fertilizer applications should contain.
Units: kg.

application_depths.description:
List of depths at which the fertilizer is injected into the soil.
Units: mm.

surface_remainder_fractions.description: List of fractions of fertilizer which remain on the soil surface when applied via injection.

pattern_repeat.description: Number of times that this fertilizer application schedule should be repeated.

pattern_skip.description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

years.description: List of years in which manure will be applied.

days.description: List of days on which manure will be applied.

nitrogen_masses.description:
List of minimum nitrogen masses that the corresponding manure applications should contain.
Units: kg.

phosphorus_masses.description:
List of minimum phosphorus masses that the corresponding manure applications should contain.
Units: kg.

potassium_masses.description:
List of minimum potassium masses that the corresponding manure applications should contain.
Units: kg.

coverage_fractions.description: List of fractions of how much of the field is covered by the corresponding manure application.

application_depths.description:
List of depths at which the manure is injected into the soil.
Units: mm.

surface_remainder_fractions.description: List of fractions of manure which remain on the soil surface when applied via injection.

pattern_repeat.description: Number of times that this manure application schedule should be repeated.

pattern_skip.description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

years.description: List of years in which manure will be applied.

days.description: List of days on which manure will be applied.

tillage_depths.description:
List of depths that the corresponding tillage applications reach.
Units: mm.

incorporation_fractions.description: List of fractions of surface pools that get incorporated into the soil during applications.

mixing_fractions.description: List of fractions of soil layer pools that are available to mix into other soil layers.

pattern_repeat.description: Number of times that this tillage schedule should be repeated.

pattern_skip.description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

natural_gas_cost_kwh.description: cost of natural gas per kwh

alfalfa_tillage_emissions.description: The amount of total tonnes CO2-eq generated from alfalfa tillage

corn_grain_tillage_emissions.description: The amount of total tonnes CO2-eq generated from corn grain tillage

corn_silage_tillage_emissions.description: The amount of total tonnes CO2-eq generated from corn silage tillage

entry.description: the entry number of the feed

units.description: the unit the feed is measured in

manure_management_scenario.description: Manure Management Scenarios -- Add as many different manure scenarios as needed

manure_pen_id.description: Manure Pen ID -- An identification number for livestock enclosures.

manure_handling_method.description: Manure Handling Method -- Method for cleaning barn alleyways.
manure_handling_method.pattern: ^{Flush System|Alley Scraper|Manual Scraping|Tillage|Manual Skid Steer Scraping}$

water_type.description: Water Type -- The type of water used for cleaning barn alleyways.

flushing_water_use_rate.description: Water Use Rate for Flushing (gal/animal/day). -- Water Use Rate for Flushing (gal/animal/day).

auto_scraping_water_use_rate.description: Water Use Rate for Auto Alley Scraping (gal/animal/day). -- Water Use Rate for Auto Alley Scraping (gal/animal/day).

manual_scraping_water_use_rate.description: Water Use Rate for Manual Skid Steer Scraping (gal/animal/day). -- Water Use Rate for Manual Skid Steer Scraping (gal/animal/day).

flushing_cleaning_frequency.description: Cleaning Frequency for Flushing (times/day). -- Cleaning Frequency for Flushing (times/day).

auto_scraping_cleaning_frequency.description: Cleaning Frequency for Auto Alley Scraping (times/day). -- Cleaning Frequency for Auto Alley Scraping (times/day).

manual_scraping_cleaning_frequency.description: Cleaning Frequency for Manual Skid Steer Scraping (times/day). -- Cleaning Frequency for Manual Skid Steer Scraping (times/day).

bedding_type.description: Bedding Type -- The material used for bedding pack.

amount_of_sand_used.description: Amount of Sand Used (kg/animal/day) -- Average amount of Sand added.

amount_of_straw_used.description: Amount of Straw Used (kg/animal/day) -- Average amount of Straw added.

amount_of_sawdust_used.description: Amount of Sawdust Used (kg/animal/day) -- Average amount of Sawdust added.

amount_of_manure_solids_used.description: Amount of Manure Solids Used (kg/animal/day) -- Average amount of Bedding added.

other_bedding_type.description: Other Bedding Type -- If selected 'other' in "Bedding Type", write bedding type here.

amount_of_other_bedding_used.description: Amount of Other Bedding Used (kg/animal/day) -- Average amount of Manure Solids added.

other_bedding_addition_frequency.description: Other Bedding Addition Frequency -- If selected 'other' in "Bedding Addition Frequency", write bedding addition frequency here.

tillage_frequency.description: Tillage Frequency (times/day). -- Turning activity of compost bedded pack (times/day).

milking_parlor_water_use_rate.description: Milking Parlor Water Use Rate (gal/animal/day) -- The water use rate for cleaning in the milking parlor (gal/animal/day).

milking_parlor_water_type.description: Milking Parlor Water Type -- The type of water used for cleaning in the milking parlor.

holding_center_water_use_rate.description: Holding Center Water Use Rate (gal/animal/day) -- The water use rate for cleaning in the holding area (gal/animal/day).

holding_center_water_type.description: Holding Center Water Type -- The type of water used for cleaning in the holding area.

sprinkler_water_use_rate.description: Sprinkler Water Use Rate (gal/animal/day) -- The water use rate for the sprinklers (gal/animal/day).

is_sprinkler_water_use_rate_animal_depen.description: Is Sprinkler Water Use Rate animal dependent? -- Whether the sprinkler water use rate varies according to the animal type.

is_sprinkler_water_use_rate_calc_on_year.description: Is Sprinkler Water Use Rate calculated on a yearly basis? -- Whether the sprinkler water use rate is calculated on a yearly basis.

bedding_type.description: Bedding Type -- The material used for bedding pack.

amount_of_straw_used.description: Amount of Straw Used (kg/animal/day) -- Average amount of Straw added.

amount_of_sawdust_used.description: Amount of Sawdust Used (kg/animal/day) -- Average amount of Sawdust added.

amount_of_compost_used.description: Amount of Compost Used (kg/animal/day) -- Average amount of Sand added.

tillage_frequency.description: Tillage Frequency (times/day). -- Turning activity of compost bedded pack (times/day).

manure_treatment_methods.description: Manure Treatment Methods -- Select the Manure Treatment Methods.

properties.pattern: ^{Slurry Storage Underfloor|Slurry Storage Outdoor|Open Lots|Compost Bedded Pack Barn|Anaerobic Lagoon|Anaerobic Digestion|Other}$

other_manure_treatment_method.description: Other Manure Treatment Methods -- If 'other' is selected in "Manure Treatment Methods", write manure treatment method here.

manure_removal_frequency_for_storage_und.description: Manure Removal Frequency for "slurry_storage_underfloor" (months) -- The frequency to remove manure when storing in slurry pit under floor (months).

manure_removal_frequency_for_storage_out.description: Manure Removal Frequency for "slurry_storage_outdoor" (months) -- The frequency to remove manure when storing in slurry pit outdoor (months).

manure_removal_frequency_for_compost_bed.description: Manure Removal Frequency for "Compost Bedded Pack Barn" (months) -- The frequency to remove manure when composting bedded pack (months).

manure_removal_frequency_for_open_lots.description: Manure Removal Frequency for "open_lots" (months) -- The frequency to remove manure when storing in open lots (months).

effluent_removal_frequency.description: Effluent Removal Frequency (months) -- The frequency to remove effluent for "anaerobic_lagoon" (months).

sludge_removal_frequency.description: Sludge Removal Frequency (years) -- The frequency to remove sludge for "anaerobic_lagoon" (years).

manure_separator_type.description: Manure Separator Type -- The type of solid-liquid separator equipment to separate coarse fibrous solids/sand

other_manure_separator.description: Other Manure Separator -- If selected 'other' in "Manure Separator Type", write manure separator type here

sand_removal_efficiency.description: Sand Removal Efficiency for "sand_lane" -- Fraction of Sand Removed for "sand_lane".

dry_solids_percentage_for_screw_press.description: Dry Solids Percentage for "screw_press" -- Final dry solids percentage for "screw_press".

dry_solids_percentage_for_rotary_screen.description: Dry Solids Percentage for "rotary_screen" -- Final dry solids percentage for "rotary_screen".

dry_solids_percentage_for_sand_lane.description: Dry  Solids  Percentage  for  "sand_lane" -- Final dry solids percentage for "sand_lane".

total_solids_removal_efficiency_for_scre.description: Total Solids Removal Efficiency for "screw_press" -- Total Solids Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

total_solids_removal_efficiency_for_rota.description: Total Solids Removal Efficiency for "rotary_screen" -- Total Solids Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

total_solids_removal_efficiency_for_sand.description: Total Solids Removal Efficiency for "sand_lane" -- Total Solids Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

volatile_solids_removal_efficiency_for_s.description: Volatile Solids Removal Efficiency for "screw_press" -- Volatile Solids Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

volatile_solids_removal_efficiency_for_r.description: Volatile Solids Removal Efficiency for "rotary_screen" -- Volatile Solids Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

volatile_solids_removal_efficiency_for_s.description: Volatile Solids Removal Efficiency for "sand_lane" -- Volatile Solids Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

nitrogen_removal_efficiency_for_screw_pr.description: Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "screw_press" -- Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

nitrogen_removal_efficiency_for_rotary_s.description: Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "rotary_screen" -- Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

nitrogen_removal_efficiency_for_sand_lan.description: Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "sand_lane" -- Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

total_ammoniacal_nitrogen_removal_effici.description: Total Ammoniacal Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "screw_press" -- Total Ammoniacal Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".
Total Ammoniacal Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "rotary_screen" -- Total Ammoniacal Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".
Total Ammoniacal Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "sand_lane" -- Total Ammoniacal Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

phosphorus_removal_efficiency_for_screw_.description: Phosphorus Removal Efficiency for "screw_press" -- Phosphorus Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

phosphorus_removal_efficiency_for_rotary.description: Phosphorus Removal Efficiency for "rotary_screen" -- Phosphorus Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

phosphorus_removal_efficiency_for_sand_l.description: Phosphorus Removal Efficiency for "sand_lane" -- Phosphorus Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

potassium_removal_efficiency_for_screw_p.description: Potassium Removal Efficiency for "screw_press" -- Potassium Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

potassium_removal_efficiency_for_rotary_.description: Potassium Removal Efficiency for "rotary_screen" -- Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

potassium_removal_efficiency_for_sand_la.description: Potassium Removal Efficiency for "sand_lane" -- Potassium Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

second_moisture_condition_parameter.description:
Curve number parameter for average moisture condition equation.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .MGT - CN2.

average_subbasin_slope.description:
Slope of the field, measured as rise over run.
Units: meters / meters or unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .HRU - HRU_SLP.

manning_roughness_coefficient.description:
Manning's "n" value for overland flow.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .HRU - OV_N.

support_practice_factor.description:
Ratio of soil loss with a specific support practice based on slope characteristics.This value adjusts for terracing, contouring, and stripcropping, and these features are not present in V1, so this value IS NOT used.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .MGT - USLE_P.

albedo.description:
Ratio of solar radiation reflected by soil to amount of incident upon it.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_ALB

initial_residue.description:
Amount of residue present on the soil surface at the start of the simulation.
Units: kg / ha.

soil_evaporation_compensation_coefficien.description:
Modifies depth distribution used to meet soil evaporative demand.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .HRU, .BSN - ESCO

soil_layers.description: The soil layers that this profile contains. Each element of the array should be a `soil_layer` object.

soil_layer_properties.description: This represents a single soil layer.

bottom_depth.description:
Bottom depth of this soil layer.
Units: mm.

soil_water_concentration.description:
Concentration of water in this layer at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: mm water / mm soil.

field_capacity_water_concentration.description:
Concentration of water in this layer when at field capacity.
Units: mm water / mm soil.

wilting_point_water_concentration.description:
Concentration of water in this layer when at field capacity.
Units: mm water / mm soil.

saturation_point_water_concentration.description:
Concentration of water in a layer when it has become saturated.
Units: mm water / mm soil.

temperature.description:
Temperature of the layer at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: degrees Celsius.

saturated_hydraulic_conductivity.description:
Measure of ease of water movement through the soil.
Units: mm / hour.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_K.

bulk_density.description:
Ratio of mass of solid particles to total volume of soil.
Units: Megagrams / cubic meter or grams / cubic centimeter.

percent_organic_carbon_content.description:
Percent of soil weight that is organic carbon.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_CBN.

percent_clay_content.description:
Percent of soil weight that is clay.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_CLAY.

percent_silt_content.description:
Percent of soil weight that is silt.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_SILT.

percent_sand_content.description:
Percent of soil weight that is sand.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_SAND.

percent_rock_content.description:
Percent of soil weight that is rock.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_ROCK.

initial_labile_inorganic_phosphorus_conc.description:
Concentration of labile inorganic phosphorus at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: milligrams / kilogram soil.

initial_fresh_organic_phosphorus_concent.description:
Concentration of fresh organic phosphorus at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: milligrams / kilogram soil.

initial_soil_nitrate_concentration.description:
Concentration of nitrate in the layer at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: milligrams / kilogram soil.

initial_soil_ammonium_concentration.description:
Concentration of ammonium in the layer at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: milligrams / kilogram soil.

humus_mineralization_rate_factor.description:
Rate factor for humus mineralization of active organic nutrients (N and P).
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .BSN - CMN.

denitrification_rate_coefficient.description:
Controls the rate of denitrification.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .BSN - CDN.

denitrification_threshold_water_content.description:
Fraction of field capacity water content above which denitrification takes place.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .BSN - SDNCO

residue_fresh_organic_mineralization_rat.description:
Fraction of residue that will decompose in a day given optimal conditions.
Unitless.
Reference SWAT Input: .BSN - RSDCO.

soil_specification.description: Name of the metadata blob that contains the data for this field's soil specification.

crop_specification.description: Name of the metadata blob that contains the data for this field's crop schedule specification.

fertilizer_management_specification.description: Name of the metadata blob that contains the data for this field's fertilizer application schedule specification.

manure_management_specification.description: Name of the metadata blob that contains the data for this field's manure application schedule specification.

tillage_management_specification.description: Name of the metadata blob that contains the data for this field's tillage application schedule specification.

absolute_latitude.description:
The absolute latitude of the center of this field.
Units: degrees.

longitude.description:
The longitude of the center of this field.
Units: degrees.

minimum_daylength.description:
Length of the shortest day of the year for watershed the field is located in.
Units: hours.

seasonal_high_water_table.description:
True if the HRU that contains the field has a high seasonal water table, false otherwise.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Theoretical documentation section 2:3.2, SWAT Input .HRU - IWATABLE.

watering_amount_in_liters.description:
Amount of water to be applied as irrigation at the end of a specified interval.
Units: liters.

watering_interval.description:
Number of days that make up the irrigation interval.
Units: days.
